pricing.trust: Secure payment via Razorpay. No subscription. No hidden charges.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Why only ₹9? Isn't that too cheap?
faq.a1: The ₹9 fee is a spam filter — only for serious creators. Your real cost is the Anthropic API you bring yourself.
faq.q2: Do I need to pay separately for AI?
faq.a2: Yes, you use your own Anthropic API key. One analysis costs approximately ₹8–40 using the free tier or pay-as-you-go.
faq.a3: Absolutely. Your API keys are stored only in your browser — encrypted. They never reach our servers.
faq.a4: Instagram, YouTube, and Facebook — all three platforms are fully supported.
faq.a5: No worries — try again or reach us on WhatsApp. We'll help you.
faq.a6: ₹9 is technically non-refundable, but if you have any issue, contact us — we'll find a solution.
